The room was disgustingly dirty — stained sheets, hair on the bathroom floor, and a layer of grime on every surface. The pool was green and closed, the gym equipment was broken, and there wasn't a single usable amenity. Staff were rude and dismissive when we complained about the appalling conditions.

Absolutely filthy hotel from top to bottom. The hallways reeked of mildew, our bathroom had mold growing in the corners, and the room hadn't been properly cleaned. The restaurant served cold, tasteless food, and the business center computers didn't work. Staff couldn't have cared less about our experience.

The cleanliness was horrifying — we found cockroaches in the bathroom, dust everywhere, and the carpet was visibly stained. The swimming pool was drained, the exercise room was locked, and the gift shop was permanently closed. The front desk staff were unhelpful and rude when we asked for a room change.

Our room was a health hazard — dirty towels from previous guests, a sticky bathroom floor, and bedsheets that smelled unwashed. The hot tub was broken, the gym was a disgrace, and the on-site restaurant gave us food poisoning. Staff at every level showed zero concern for guest comfort or safety.

The lobby was grimy with peeling wallpaper, and our room was no better — dusty surfaces, stained carpet, and a bathroom that made us gag. The pool area was littered with debris, and the fitness center had broken machines. Service was non-existent; staff ignored our calls and complaints entirely.

We've never stayed in a dirtier hotel. The bathroom had rust stains, the hallway carpets were sticky, and our room smelled of cigarette smoke. The spa was closed indefinitely, the restaurant was revolting, and the business center was a joke. Staff were hostile when confronted about these issues.

The room cleanliness was abysmal — the shower had black mold, the toilet wasn't flushed, and there were crumbs in the bed. The swimming pool was a murky health hazard, and the gym door was jammed shut. We complained to three different staff members and not a single one took action.

Filthy corridors, a disgusting room, and a bathroom that looked like it hadn't been cleaned in weeks. The on-site restaurant was unsanitary, the exercise room equipment was rusty, and the gift shop was unstaffed. The front desk was impossible to reach, and when we finally got through, they were dismissive.

The entire hotel was in a state of decay — dirty lobbies, stained hallways, and rooms that were clearly not properly cleaned between guests. The pool was unusable, the hot tub was drained, and the gym was depressing. Staff were rude, unresponsive, and showed complete disregard for paying guests.

Our bathroom was disgusting beyond words — mildew on the ceiling, a clogged drain, and towels that smelled sour. The restaurant food was inedible, the business center was out of service, and the pool looked unsafe. Service was the worst we've ever encountered; staff actively avoided helping us.

The cleanliness was appalling from the moment we walked in — a dirty lobby, grimy elevators, and a room that made us want to leave immediately. The swimming pool had algae, the fitness center was unusable, and the gift shop was overpriced and neglected. Staff were indifferent and borderline hostile.

We found bed bugs in our room, the bathroom had visible mold, and the hallways were littered with trash. The restaurant gave multiple guests food poisoning, the gym was dangerous with broken equipment, and the spa was a disaster. Not a single staff member apologized or attempted to make things right.

The room was a nightmare of poor hygiene — dusty vents blowing stale air, a bathroom with lime deposits everywhere, and sheets that were clearly not fresh. The on-site amenities were all broken or closed — pool, gym, business center. The staff were impossible to find and useless when located.

Horrific cleanliness throughout the hotel — sticky lobby floors, filthy corridors, and a room that smelled of sewage. The swimming pool was closed, the hot tub leaked, and the restaurant was shuttered. Service was a cruel joke; the front desk staff were rude, unhelpful, and couldn't process a simple request.

Our room had stains on the walls, a bathroom with rusted fixtures, and dust thick enough to write your name in. The exercise room was locked, the pool was drained, and the gift shop was empty. Staff were dismissive, unavailable, and utterly unqualified to work in hospitality.

The cleanliness was non-existent — our bathroom floor was covered in grime, the bed had suspicious stains, and the room smelled terrible. The on-site restaurant was closed more often than open, the gym was abandoned, and the business center was a broken desk with no working equipment. Staff ignored every complaint we made.

This hotel fails on every front: the lobby was dirty, our room was unsanitary, and the bathroom was revolting with mold and soap scum everywhere. The pool was a liability, the spa was closed, and the restaurant served barely edible food. Staff ranged from apathetic to actively rude during our nightmare stay.

The hallways reeked and were visibly dirty, our room had cockroach droppings, and the bathroom was a biohazard with black mold and a broken toilet. The swimming pool was green, the gym was padlocked, and there were no functioning amenities to speak of. Service was the worst — rude, dismissive, negligent staff at every turn.

We were shocked by the filth — the room had dusty blinds, a stained mattress, and a bathroom that needed a hazmat team. The on-site restaurant was closed, the fitness center was unusable, and the hot tub was full of debris. Staff refused to acknowledge any problems and offered no assistance whatsoever.

The entire hotel was a disaster of poor cleanliness — dirty common areas, revolting guest rooms, and bathrooms that were genuinely unsafe. The pool, gym, and business center were all either broken or closed. Service was absolutely terrible, with staff who were rude, unreachable, and completely indifferent to guest complaints.
